description_long: This kindergarten building features a single-story, L-shaped layout with multiple rooms and large windows, designed to maximize natural light and visibility. The exterior is primarily white with green accents along the base, and the structure is surrounded by a paved area that could serve as a playground or drop-off zone. A small swing set is positioned adjacent to the building, indicating a dedicated outdoor play area for children. The roof is flat, and the building includes several entry points, likely for easy access and safety. The windows are large and symmetrically placed, but there are no visible decorative elements such as shutters or flower boxes. The overall design is functional and modern, with an emphasis on safety and accessibility for young children.
description: A modern, single-story L-shaped kindergarten with large windows, green accents, and an adjacent swing set for outdoor play. The building is surrounded by a paved area and features a flat roof and multiple entry points.
description_view_0: View 0 shows the main entrance area, the L-shaped layout, and the swing set positioned to the left of the building.
description_view_1: View 1 highlights the paved area wrapping around the building and provides a clear look at the central courtyard and entry points.
description_view_2: View 2 displays the rear side of the building, with large windows and the swing set now on the right, emphasizing the building's symmetry.
description_view_3: View 3 presents the opposite side of the building, showing additional entry points and the swing set in the foreground.
attribute_architectural_style: modern, functional, flat-roofed with large windows and minimal ornamentation
